 {"id":"bd-3dm2","title":"Fix test isolation - 215 tests fail when run together but pass individually","description":"## Problem
Running bun run test shows 215 failures, but each test file passes when run individually.

## Root Cause
Tests use mock.module to mock the database module (../db), which causes mock pollution across test files. When one test file mocks the db, other tests that run later get the stale mock instead of the real implementation.

The error sql2.toQuery is not a function is a symptom of this mock pollution.

## Evidence
- bun test handoff.service.test.ts → 24 pass
- bun test job.service.test.ts → 26 pass  
- bun test apps/gateway/src/__tests__ → 207 fail
- File dcg-pending.service.test.ts has comments acknowledging mock interference

## Potential Fixes
1. Use dependency injection instead of global mocks
2. Create isolated database instances per test file
3. Use afterEach/afterAll to restore mocks properly
4. Consider using test fixtures with proper isolation

## Files Affected
Most test files in apps/gateway/src/__tests__/","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-20T19:55:46.144261437Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-20T21:16:49.364637459Z","closed_at":"2026-01-20T21:16:49.364589619Z","close_reason":"Added afterAll(mock.restore) to all mock.module test files and ensured logger mocks include child; running bun test apps/gateway/src/__tests__ --bail=1 now only fails at dashboard widget id generation (tracked as bd-2cn8).","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3dm2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_gateway-d94","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-20T19:55:46.173882220Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_gateway-04a","title":"Update conflicts routes to use canonical response envelope","description":"# Task: Update Conflicts Routes to Use Canonical Response Envelope

## Parent Epic
[Epic] API Response Structure Standardization (flywheel_gateway-tt0)

## Endpoints to Update

### 1. GET /conflicts (list)
- Use sendList()
- Object type for items: "conflict"

### 2. GET /conflicts/history
- Use sendList()
- Already has offset/limit pagination (will convert to cursor-based in pagination epic)

### 3. GET /conflicts/stats
- Object type: "conflict_stats"

### 4. GET /conflicts/config
- Object type: "alert_config"

### 5. PATCH /conflicts/config
- Object type: "alert_config"

### 6. GET /conflicts/:conflictId
- Object type: "conflict"
- Include links: self, resolve

### 7. POST /conflicts/:conflictId/resolve
- Object type: "conflict_resolution"
- Status: 200

### 8. POST /conflicts/check/reservation
- Object type: "conflict_check"

### 9. POST /conflicts/scan/git
- Object type: "git_scan_result"

### 10. POST /conflicts/scan/contention
- Object type: "contention_scan_result"

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 10 endpoints use canonical envelope
- [ ] Lists use sendList()
- [ ] Error responses use wrapError
- [ ] Tests updated

## Dependencies
- Depends on: Create response wrapper utility functions (flywheel_gateway-3ib)

## Files to Modify
- `apps/gateway/src/routes/conflicts.ts`","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-11T15:04:24.244627604Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T17:43:10.654595607Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T17:43:10.654595607Z","close_reason":"Already implemented - routes use sendResource, sendList, sendNotFound, etc.","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_gateway-04a","depends_on_id":"flywheel_gateway-3ib","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T15:13:35.715960616Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_gateway-0cg","title":"Implement analytics query caching layer","description":"## Task
Add an in-memory caching layer for analytics queries to reduce SQLite load and smooth dashboard refreshes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] QueryCache supports TTL + size cap
- [ ] Cache hit/miss metrics emitted
- [ ] Invalidation on agent event ingest
- [ ] Concurrency-safe for simultaneous requests

## Test Plan
- Unit: cache get/set/invalidate + TTL expiry
- Integration: analytics service uses cache correctly
- E2E: dashboard refresh does not re-query DB within TTL

## Logging
- Structured cache logs with key, ttl, hit/miss, and size

## Dependencies
None

## Estimated Complexity
Medium
